name: Guildheart Hub
seasonal_change: Peak caravan seasons thicken hearings, storage disputes, night-loading, and temporary freight overflow into adjacent urban blocks.
seasonal_effects: Peak caravan seasons thicken hearings, storage disputes, night-loading, and temporary freight overflow into adjacent urban blocks.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
